prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

vulnerablePopulations: people with comorbid substance use disorders
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11: at least one manic episode

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with maintenance therapy and monitoring

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Structured specialist pathways and monitoring common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Mood stabilizers and antipsychotics; psychoeducation and relapse prevention programs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cross-country variability and comorbid substance use
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to treatment and monitoring in many member states
